hero.eyebrow: Established Medical Equipment OEM and Supplier
hero.title: 6 Decades as India's Most Accountable Medical Equipment Partner
hero.description:
We manufacture CSSD equipment and sterilisation systems at our Mumbai facility and distribute 14+ elite global and domestic brands to equip every other department in your healthcare facility. 

Our direct engineering and sales team serves as your single point of contact: handling layout design, technical specifications, commercials, compliance validation, and lifetime AMC/CMC support

hero_panel.title: OEM manufacturer with direct service accountability
hero_panel.description: Long manufacturing heritage, 14 integrated global and domestic brands, and a single post-sale service relationship. All under 1 partner.

specs.label: Scope
specs.value: Manufactured Equipment + 14 Global and Domestic Brands

capabilities.label: Core Capabilities
capabilities.title: Two Pillars of Healthcare Technology Excellence

cards.title: Indigenous Manufacturing
cards.description: Engineering world-class Sterilization Systems and CSSD infrastructure built to global standards at our Mumbai Factory.

cards.title: Global & Domestic Distribution
cards.description: Authorized integration partner for 14+ global and domestic medical equipment brands across India. Catering to every department in your healthcare facility.

capabilities.description: PEIC is the only partner in India that brings an OEM manufacturer's technical discipline to both its own sterilization systems and the other medical equipment brands it supplies. Fewer vendor handoffs. Integrated commercial Terms. Clearer service ownership. Equipment decisions backed by engineering judgment.

advantage.label: Why PEIC
advantage.title: Built for procurement scrutiny
advantage.description: For direct outreach, tenders, service planning, and multi-department purchases, PEIC presents the credibility of an established manufacturer with the reach of an authorized med-tech integration partner.

cta.label: Procurement Conversation
cta.title: Need a credible equipment partner for an active purchase?
cta.description: Share the department, city, timeline, and products required. PEIC will route the enquiry to the right commercial or technical team.
